overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game depicting a character traversing a snowy mountain wilderness at dusk. The character journeys along a frozen river valley, moves through dense pine forests, slides down rocky slopes, and continues into worsening fog and snow conditions.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with frozen river

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the snow-covered riverbank through the open valley, following the winding path between snow-laden pine trees

entered.detail: deep snow covering the valley floor with visible footprints
partially frozen river flowing through the valley
tall evergreen trees heavy with snow on the left mountainside
tall evergreen trees heavy with snow on the right mountainside
snow-capped mountain peaks visible in the background under overcast sky

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide snowy mountain valley at dusk, following a path alongside a partially frozen river. Snow-covered pine trees line both sides of the valley while distant peaks are visible under the overcast sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense pine forest on mountain slope with rocky outcrops

events.description: character slides down a steep rocky snow-covered slope, losing footing and descending rapidly

agents.ego_description: navigating through dense forest, moving between closely spaced pine trees, then sliding down a rocky incline

entered.detail: thick cluster of snow-laden evergreen trees surrounding the path
large exposed rock formations emerging from the snow
steep incline of rock and snow that the character slides down

segments.scene_description: Moving from the open valley into a dense pine forest, the character navigates between closely spaced trees with limited sky visibility. The segment ends with a sudden slide down a steep rocky snow-covered slope.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky river passage with large boulders

agents.ego_description: walking carefully along the riverbank through a narrow rocky passage, navigating around large snow-covered boulders

entered.detail: large rocks covered in deep snow lining the path
steep rock faces forming the canyon walls

segments.scene_description: After the slide, the character continues along the river through a narrow rocky passage. Large snow-covered boulders line the path while steep cliff walls rise on the left, creating an enclosed canyon-like environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: foggy mountain trail in heavy snowstorm

events.description: heavy fog and blowing snow significantly reduce visibility, obscuring distant landscape

agents.ego_description: trudging through deep snow along the narrowing path as visibility drops in the worsening storm

entered.detail: thick fog rolling through the valley reducing visibility to near zero

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character walking into increasingly severe weather conditions. Heavy fog and blowing snow engulf the landscape, reducing visibility dramatically as the character continues along the narrowing mountain trail beside the river.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a snowy mountain wilderness that transforms from an open river valley into a claustrophobic, storm-swept canyon. It begins with the character walking along a partially frozen river under an overcast dusk sky, flanked by wide stretches of snow-covered pine trees and distant peaks. As the path narrows, the camera moves from the open valley into a dense pine forest with limited visibility before the character suddenly slides down a steep, rocky, snow-covered slope. The scene then shifts into a narrow rocky passage where large boulders and towering cliff walls create an enclosed canyon environment along the river's edge. Finally, the landscape is engulfed by increasingly severe weather, with heavy fog and blowing snow dramatically reducing visibility as the character continues along the narrowing mountain trail.
